response.justification: Wei Chen is a strong hands-on senior full-stack engineer with roughly 18 years of experience, entrepreneurial open-source founding experience, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling). However, the role is a director-level principal engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms at scale. The candidate's career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not strategic technical leadership, and there is no evidence of deep AI/ML expertise, advising strategic customers, or influencing product direction at the level this role demands.
strengths: 18+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products at platform scale
Career level is senior/staff IC delivery, well below director-level strategic leadership scope
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap versus director-level strategy role
Long, diverse engineering experience with entrepreneurial background
